name: better-automationanywhere-dx
description: Better AA Developer Experience for Automation Anywhere

scripts.submit:dry-run: pnpm zip && pnpm zip:firefox && node scripts/submit-stores.mjs --dry-run
scripts.submit:stores: pnpm zip && pnpm zip:firefox && node scripts/submit-stores.mjs
scripts.check:maintenance: tsc --noEmit && node scripts/test-style-doctor.mjs && node scripts/test-control-room-version.mjs && node scripts/test-background-colors.mjs && node scripts/test-debug.mjs && node scripts/test-variable-metadata.mjs && node scripts/test-taskbot-tools.mjs && wxt build && wxt build -b firefox
